---
title: "STICKY HOISIN PORK RIBS WITH TANGY SMASHED CUCUMBERS AND GARLIC RICE » Gordon Ramsay.com"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Pork"]
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="STICKY HOISIN PORK RIBS WITH TANGY SMASHED CUCUMBERS AND GARLIC RICE » Gordon Ramsay.com.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```
